bet2_water_electrothermal.label: Continuous water-electrothermal on Saturn-water purity (A1)
bet2_water_electrothermal.retired_by: the demonstrator's own continuous-months water-thruster run on bag-filtered chunk water (IS the test article)
bet2_water_electrothermal.retirement_cost_class: high (requires the full Saturn cruise + months of operation; no shortcut)

bet3_reactor.label: Kilopower-class reactor program (L0-24)
bet3_reactor.retired_by: DEFERRED — demonstrator flies non-nuclear (RTG/solar-hybrid); reactor retired in a separate mission / by NASA FSP

gate_classification.highest_leverage_rationale: bet1 Earth-orbit proxy is cheap, pre-cruise, and lifts A14 0.53->0.69 by retiring 3 of 5 sub-steps; bet2 only lifts via the full multi-month Saturn run. Per unit cost/mission-risk, bet1 buys the most readiness.
recommended_sequence: 1. bet1 Earth-orbit catch-and-contain proxy (cheap, pre-cruise) -> lift A14 to ~0.69 BEFORE committing the cruise
2. bet2 continuous-months water-thruster run during the Saturn demonstrator cruise (the long pole; dominant-kill)
3. bet3 reactor DEFERRED off critical path (fly non-nuclear)

program_readiness.interpretation: Scenario A (commit the Saturn cruise without the Earth-orbit proxy) is a 25% joint shot at retiring both on-path bets in one mission. Scenario B (Earth-orbit proxy first, lifting bet1 to 0.69) raises that to 33%. The proxy is the cheap option-value purchase.

tranche_mapping.new_tranche1_gate: internal demonstrator: Earth-orbit catch-and-contain (bet1) + continuous-months water-thruster on chunk water (bet2)
tranche_mapping.reactor_status: bet3 deferred off critical path (demonstrator non-nuclear)
tranche_mapping.reading: The re-gated tranche-1 pass probability (~33% under Earth-orbit-proxy-first) is ~14x the external FSP-2 award probability (0.023). The program now spends its tranche-1 budget on an experiment it CONTROLS, with a materially higher pass probability, and the dominant external kill-gate (FSP-2) is removed from the critical path.
tranche_mapping.cost_class_usd_M: 150-1500 (Hayabusa2 ~150-300M to OSIRIS-REx ~1B class; non-nuclear demonstrator below the reactor-bundled path)
